violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment to order test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
A handwash aid was at the 3 bay sink. Hand wash aid dispenser must be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
